# Subscription Pricing Changes

When the regular price of a subscribed product changes, the new pricing takes effect for the next shipment following the change. Members receive an email notification about the price change at least seven days in advance. Additionally, any standing five percent subscription discount is applied based on the current regular price.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-pricing-changes]
